    Cap the cumulative bytes used by spill files under tempDirectory(String).

    Cap the memory pool at maxMemoryBytes, reserving fraction of it for queries.

    SessionContextBuilder

    Apply every entry of entries via setOption(String, String), in LinkedHashMap insertion order.

    Apply every entry of entries via setOption(String, String).
